steps.expected: CLI exports data from Linear with progress reporting
steps.observed: CLI displayed progress for teams (1), workflow_states (7), labels (10), users (2), issues (404), comments (89 across 61 issues), parent-child mappings (301). Export completed with exit code 0.

steps.expected: Export directory contains JSON files and subdirectories
steps.observed: Directory contains: teams.json, workflow_states.json, labels.json, users.json, issues.json, comments/ (61 files), mappings/parent_child.json, validation_report.json

steps.action: Verify export directory structure contains all required files
steps.expected: teams.json, workflow_states.json, labels.json, users.json, issues.json, comments/ subdirectory, mappings/
steps.observed: All required files present: teams.json (1 record), workflow_states.json (7 records), labels.json (5 records), users.json (1 record), issues.json (404 records), comments/ (61 files with 89 total comments), mappings/parent_child.json (301 records)

steps.action: Count records in each JSON file
steps.expected: Non-zero record counts for all entity types
steps.observed: teams: 1, workflow_states: 7, labels: 5, users: 1, issues: 404, comment files: 61, parent_child mappings: 301

steps.expected: CLI imports data with progress reporting and counts
steps.observed: CLI displayed import progress: Teams 1 imported/0 skipped, Workflow states 7/0, Labels 5/0, Users 1/0, Issues 404/0, Parent-child backfills 301, Comments 89/0. Exit code 0.

steps.action: Verify imported data via GraphQL API
steps.expected: Issue count in database matches export (404)
steps.observed: GraphQL query returned 404 SON-team issues, matching export count exactly.

evidence.databaseVerification: API query confirmed 404 SON issues in database

steps.expected: CLI reports pass/fail per entity type comparing imported data to export source
steps.observed: CLI displayed verification results with PASS for all 6 entity types: Teams (1/1), Workflow States (7/7), Labels (5/5), Users (1/1), Issues (404/404), Comments (89/89). Final message: 'All checks passed! Import data matches export source.' Exit code 0.

steps.action: Count issues before second import via GraphQL API
Run import again on same export data
steps.expected: Import skips already-imported records or fails with clear message, no duplicates
steps.observed: All records skipped: Teams 0 imported/1 skipped, Workflow states 0/7, Labels 0/5, Users 0/1, Issues 0/404, Comments 0/89, Parent-child links 0. Exit code 0.

steps.action: Count issues after second import via GraphQL API
steps.observed: API returned 404 SON issues — count unchanged

frictions.description: Export command took over 180 seconds due to Linear API rate limits on comment fetching (404 issues, 50 at a time). First attempt timed out and left export directory empty (data not flushed to disk). Required 300s timeout.
frictions.resolution: Increased timeout to 300 seconds for the export command. Export completed successfully on second run.

frictions.description: Export summary counts differ from what was fetched during export: labels reported 10 during fetch but wrote 5 to labels.json; users reported 2 during fetch but wrote 1 to users.json. The CLI progress output counts include team-scoped items but the final export may filter or deduplicate.
frictions.resolution: The final Summary section correctly shows Labels: 5 and Users: 1 matching the written files. The mid-export 'Exported N' messages appear to reflect raw Linear API counts before deduplication/filtering.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-CLI-016 (export) produced complete data from Linear. VAL-IMP-001 (directory completeness) confirmed all required files with correct record counts. VAL-CLI-017 (import) successfully imported all 404 issues, 89 comments, and 301 parent-child relationships. VAL-CLI-018 (verify) confirmed 100% parity between export and database. VAL-IMP-009 (idempotency) confirmed re-import skips all existing records with no duplicates (404 before and after).
